mapper.select: select * from mar_goods where id=#{goodsId} and goods_status=1
select id,goods_name,price,goods_picture from mar_goods order by rand() limit 4

select mar_goods.id,goods_name,price,goods_picture from mar_goods left join mar_check on mar_goods.id=mar_check.goods_id where goods_status=1 and mar_check.check_time>=date(now()) and mar_check.check_time < DATE_ADD(date(now()),INTERVAL 1 DAY)
select id,goods_name,price,goods_picture from mar_goods where goods_status=1
select id,goods_name,price,goods_picture from mar_goods where goods_status=1 and goods_name like concat('%',#{keyWords},'%')
mapper.update: update mar_goods set number=number-#{billNumber} where id=#{goodsId}
update mar_goods set number=#{number}, goods_name=#{goodsName}, introduction=#{introduction}, price=#{price}, goods_picture=#{goodsPicture} where id=#{id}
